title: psychotria diffusa var. agusanensis
intro: Psychotria diffusa var. agusanensis, also known as Agusan wild coffee or Agusan psychotria, is a plant species native to the Philippines and is a variant of the Psychotria diffusa plant. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties, as well as its ability to act as an antihistamine and antioxidant. The health benefits of Psychotria diffusa var. agusanensis include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
